PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/orders" -UseBasicParsing; $data = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "Total orders: $\($data.Count\)"; $data | Where-Object { $_.id -ge 33 } | ForEach-Object { "  #$\($_.id\) type=$\($_.type\) status=$\($_.status\) addr=$\($_.deliveryAddress\) lat=$\($_.deliveryLatitude\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/delivery/smart-queue" -UseBasicParsing; $data = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "Stats: preparing=$\($data.stats.preparing\) ready=$\($data.stats.ready\) waiting=$\($data.stats.waiting\)"; "`nNew Clusters:"; foreach \($c in $data.newClusters\) { "  $\($c.emoji\) $\($c.direction\) - $\($c.orders.Count\) orders \(avg dist: $\($c.avgDist\)km\)"; foreach \($o in $c.orders\) { "    #$\($o.id\) $\($o.customerName\) - $\($o.deliveryAddress\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.18.5:3000/api/table-menu" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; $d = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "Categories: $\($d.categories.Count\), Items: $\($d.items.Count\), Options: $\($d.options.Count\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.18.5:3000/table/1" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; if \($r.Content -match 'tableNo'\) { "OK: Table page has tableNo reference" } else { "Content preview: " + $r.Content.Substring\(0, 500\) } } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3003/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "Login: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Login Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3003/courier" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -MaximumRedirection 0; "Courier: $\($r2.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Courier: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($results = @\(\); try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $results += "Next.js \(3000\): OK \($\($r.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { $results += "Next.js \(3000\): FAIL" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3003/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $results += "WhatsApp Bot \(3003\): OK \($\($r2.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { $results += "WhatsApp Bot \(3003\): OK \(running\)" }; try { $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.18.5:3000/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $results += "LAN Erisim \(192.168.18.5:3000\): OK \($\($r3.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { $results += "LAN Erisim \(192.168.18.5:3000\): FAIL" }; $results | ForEach-Object { $_ })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/menu" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15 -Headers @{ "Cookie" = "varosh_session=test" } -MaximumRedirection 0; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\), Length: $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { $ex = $_.Exception; if \($ex.Response\) { "Status: $\($ex.Response.StatusCode\)" } else { "Error: $\($ex.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($body = '{"pin":"1234"}'; $loginResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -SessionVariable session; "Login: $\($loginResp.StatusCode\) - $\($loginResp.Content\)"; $menuResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/menu" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15 -WebSession $session -MaximumRedirection 5; "Menu: $\($menuResp.StatusCode\), Length: $\($menuResp.Content.Length\)")

PowerShell($body = '{"pin":"1234"}'; $s = $null; $loginResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -SessionVariable s; "Login: $\($loginResp.StatusCode\)"; @\("/menu", "/pos", "/kitchen", "/", "/orders"\) | ForEach-Object { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$_" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -WebSession $s; "$_ : $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { "$_ : FAIL - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($body = '{"pin":"1234"}'; $s = $null; $loginResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -SessionVariable s; @\("/waiter", "/courier"\) | ForEach-Object { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$_" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -WebSession $s; "$_ : $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { "$_ : FAIL" } })

PowerShell(@\("menu", "pos"\) | ForEach-Object { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/_next/static/chunks/app/\(admin\)/$_/page.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "$_ page JS: OK \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)" } catch { "$_ page JS: FAIL" } }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/_next/static/chunks/app/\(waiter\)/waiter/page.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "waiter page JS: OK \($\($r2.Content.Length\) bytes\)" } catch { "waiter page JS: FAIL" }; try { $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/_next/static/chunks/app/\(pos\)/pos/page.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "pos page JS: OK \($\($r3.Content.Length\) bytes\)" } catch { "pos page JS: FAIL" })
